title: arethusa alaris
intro: Arethusa alaris, also known as the Raven's Wings or American Adder's Tongue, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. It is a member of the orchid family and is characterized by its purple flowers and grass-like foliage. Arethusa alaris has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support immune function and overall health.
